_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: we examined overlapping genes among the top 100, 200, and 500 genes ranked by raw p-values. The results showed 6, 7, and 27 overlapping genes, respectively
details: Showed limited overlap with SKAT-O in top-ranked genes: 6, 7, and 27 overlapping genes among top 100, 200, and 500 genes respectively
